thesis: Custom AI silicon for hyperscalers; Q1 FY2027 revenue $2.418B (+28% YoY) record; CFO transition (Dan Durn from Adobe, June 15) neutral; diversifies semi exposure from GPU sellers to custom ASIC; pre-market plan activated when META buffer exceeded 4pp on Iran ceasefire risk-on
